description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a low boundary wall and featuring a paved driveway leading to a double garage. The exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored stone and white plaster, with large rectangular windows arranged in neat rows on both floors. The front entryway is accentuated by a recessed doorway with a small overhang and flanked by vertical windows, while the backyard includes a patio area with lounge chairs and a covered section. The property is landscaped with several medium-sized trees and a manicured lawn, providing a welcoming and private atmosphere. The flat roof design and clean geometric lines give the house a contemporary urban appeal.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, double garage, large windows, and landscaped yard enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entryway with overhang, paved driveway, and two trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of windows on the upper and lower floors, the boundary wall, and additional trees in the yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio with lounge chairs, covered area, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the patio, covered section, paved paths, and more of the landscaped garden.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a small overhang, flanked by vertical windows and accessed via a paved path.
